validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.phone_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number
validation.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwords_mismatch: Passwords do not match. Please try again.
validation.password_requires_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.password_requires_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.password_requires_number: Password must contain at least one number
validation.password_requires_special: Password must contain at least one special character

error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
error.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
error.unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this resource.
error.not_found: The requested resource was not found.
error.server_error: Internal server error. Please try again later.
error.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
error.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please try again later.

auth.error_recovery: If this error persists, please contact support.
auth.identifierRequired: Please enter your email or phone
auth.identifierRequired_dynamic: Please enter your email, phone, or {{fieldName}}

setup.title: Set Up Passkey
setup.description: Add a passkey to use Touch ID, Face ID, Windows Hello, or a security key for faster, more secure sign-in.
setup.friendlyNameHelp: A name to help you identify this passkey later
setup.successMessage: Your passkey has been successfully registered. You can now use it for two-factor authentication.
setup.errorNotSupported: Your browser does not support passkeys. Please use a modern browser like Chrome, Safari, Edge, or Firefox.
setup.errorCancelled: Registration was cancelled. Please try again.
setup.errorGeneric: An error occurred during registration. Please try again.
setup.errorNotSecure: Passkeys require a secure connection (HTTPS). Please access this site over HTTPS to use passkeys.
setup.infoStep2: Use your device's biometric or security key
setup.infoStep3: Optionally name your passkey for easy identification

mfa.title: Passkey Verification
mfa.description: Use your passkey to verify your identity
mfa.passkeyMethodDescription: Use Touch ID, Face ID, Windows Hello, or your security key
mfa.errorNotSupported: Your browser does not support passkeys. Please use another verification method.
mfa.errorCancelled: Authentication was cancelled. Please try again.
mfa.errorNoCredentials: No passkeys found for this account. Please use another verification method.
mfa.errorGeneric: An error occurred during authentication. Please try again.
mfa.errorNotSecure: Passkeys require a secure connection (HTTPS). Please access this site over HTTPS to use passkeys.
mfa.errorTimeout: Session timed out. Please try again.

401.title: Authentication Required
401.description: You need to be logged in to access this resource.

403.title: Access Denied
403.description: You don't have permission to access this resource.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

500.title: Server Error
500.description: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.

recovery.title: Account Recovery
recovery.subtitle: Recover access to your account
recovery.help_text: Use backup codes, recovery email, or SMS. Contact support if needed.
recovery.sms_sent_desc: We sent a verification code to {{phone}}
recovery.locked_out: Too many attempts. Try again in {{minutes}} minutes.
recovery.no_methods_available: No recovery methods are configured for this account. Please contact support.
recovery.user_not_found: If an account exists with this identifier, you will receive instructions to recover it.
